root = Card([table], "Benchmark Results", "50 runs across scenarios, models, and arms", "full")
csv = Query("read_csv", {path: "./data/results.csv"}, {rows: [], columns: []})
table = DataTable("results.csv", csv.columns, csv.rows, true)

toolInput.title: Render a 50-row CSV on disk as a sortable table
